hero.description: full-stack developer specializing in interactive journalism and digital experiences — transforming data and narratives into engaging visual stories.

about.label: about
about.title: who i am.
about.lede: i'm a developer who lives at the intersection of code and storytelling.
about.bio1: at grupo rbs, i build interactive experiences that help millions of readers understand complex stories — from flood recovery dashboards to real-time election trackers.
about.bio2: my work blends frontend engineering with data journalism, creating tools that make information accessible and engaging. i believe the best digital experiences are the ones that disappear — leaving only understanding behind.

work.label: experience
work.title: work history.
work.description: seven years across newsrooms, agencies, and product teams — building interactive experiences for millions.

skills.label: expertise
skills.title: skills & tools.
skills.description: a toolkit built around building fast, building right, and building with care.
